executives.name: Tim S. Gitzel
executives.background: Tim Gitzel is President and Chief Executive Officer of Cameco. He has more than 30 years of experience in the Canadian and international uranium mining industry. He joined Cameco in 2007 as Senior Vice-President and Chief Operating Officer and was appointed President in 2010 and CEO in 2011. Prior to joining Cameco, he was Executive Vice-President, mining business unit for AREVA in Paris, France.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice-President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Grant E. Isaac
executives.background: Grant Isaac is Executive Vice-President and Chief Financial Officer. He joined Cameco in 2009 and has held various executive roles including Senior Vice-President, Corporate Strategy and Vice-President, Corporate Strategy and Business Development. Before joining Cameco, he was the Dean of the Edwards School of Business at the University of Saskatchewan.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice-President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Brian P. Reilly
executives.background: Brian Reilly is Senior Vice-President and Chief Operating Officer. He joined Cameco in 2011 as President of Cameco Resources and was appointed to his current role in 2017. He has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry, including roles with AREVA.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice-President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Alice B. Wong
executives.background: Alice Wong is Senior Vice-President and Chief Corporate Officer. She has been with Cameco for over 30 years, holding various leadership positions in marketing, corporate responsibility, and human resources.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice-President and Chief Corporate Officer

executives.name: Sean A. Quinn
executives.background: Sean Quinn is Senior Vice-President, Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary. He joined Cameco in 1993 and has held various legal roles within the company.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice-President, Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary

board_of_directors.name: Ian Bruce
board_of_directors.background: Ian Bruce is the Chair of the Board. He is the former President and CEO of Peters & Co. Limited, an investment firm. He has extensive experience in investment banking and the oil and gas industry.
committees: Nominating, Corporate Governance and Risk Committee

board_of_directors.name: Daniel Camus
board_of_directors.background: Daniel Camus is the former Group CFO and Head of Strategy and International Activities of Electricité de France (EDF). He has significant experience in the global energy sector.

board_of_directors.name: Donald Kayne
board_of_directors.background: Donald Kayne is the President and CEO of Canfor Corporation and CEO of Canfor Pulp Products Inc. He has over 40 years of experience in the forest products industry.
committees: Nominating, Corporate Governance and Risk Committee

board_of_directors.name: Kathryn Jackson
board_of_directors.background: Kathryn Jackson is the former Senior Vice-President and Chief Technology Officer of RTI International Metals, Inc. She has a PhD in Engineering and Public Policy.
committees: Safety, Health, Environment, Quality and Technical Committee
Nominating, Corporate Governance and Risk Committee

board_of_directors.name: Dominique Minière
board_of_directors.background: Dominique Minière is the former President of Nuclear and Chief Strategy Officer at Ontario Power Generation. He has extensive experience in nuclear operations.
committees: Safety, Health, Environment, Quality and Technical Committee
